steps.title: Find a count below 31
steps.content: The assertion says 31 blackspotted rockskippers at station 3 was not the lowest count at any station. To support that, the completion must identify a table entry lower than 31 and report it accurately.

steps.title: Check each data claim
steps.content: A gives a lower number but misquotes the species and station, B gives 610, and D gives 50. Those values do not prove a lower accurate count than 31. The accurate lower count is 16 barred flagtails at station 3. The answer is C.
